documentation_impact.rationale: The repository-layout migration changes canonical topology, archived workspace locations, and persona projection policy surfaces, so ship-stage ratification requires explicit documentation-impact evidence before index advancement.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Artifact is emitted at canonical work/<day>/<task-id>/policy-compliance.json for ship-stage governance and preserves local-only staging boundaries.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Record captures mandatory documentation-impact analysis, validation evidence, and explicit operator-controlled advancement semantics.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Ship-stage output supports supervised feature-delivery gates with no auto-push/auto-PR behavior and explicit local ratification evidence.

git_evidence.status_summary: Working tree contains expected broad repository-layout migration changes (archive/work/lib moves and persona projection consolidation) plus the active run artifacts for this task; no commit or push executed during ship stage.
git_evidence.diff_summary: Task workspace diff remains artifact-centric under work/172976_05-30-26/65447_0549_repository-layout-restructure-and-archive-migration; policy artifact is additive for ship-gate evidence.
